questions.question: Describe the process of how a photometric image is formed in a camera. Be sure to include the role of lenses, light sources, and image sensors.
questions.hint: Focus on the key components involved in image formation.

questions.question: Explain the difference between a pinhole camera and a camera with a lens. How does the lens affect the quality of the captured image?
questions.hint: Provide a clear comparison of the two types of cameras.

questions.question: What is the primary function of an image sensor in a camera? Describe its role in converting light into an electrical signal.
questions.hint: Focus on the conversion process and its significance in image formation.
